questionHtml:
Which factors can affect the rate of reaction?

     I.     Particle size of solid reactant

     II.     Concentration of reacting solution

     III.     Pressure of reacting gas

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: Which factors can affect the rate of reaction? I. Particle size of solid reactant II. Concentration of reacting solution III. Pressure of reacting gas A. I and II only B. I and III
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
